name: transmission
description: BitTorrent client with a web UI and persistent config

fields.name: TRANSMISSION_WEB_PORT
fields.label: Web UI Port
fields.help: Port used to open the Transmission web interface in your browser.

fields.name: TRANSMISSION_PEER_PORT
fields.label: Peer Port
fields.help: Port used for torrent peer connections over both TCP and UDP.

fields.name: TRANSMISSION_CONFIG_LOCATION
fields.label: Transmission Config Folder
fields.help: Stores Transmission configuration, session data, and application state.

fields.name: DOWNLOADS_LOCATION
fields.label: Downloads Folder
fields.help: Folder where Transmission will save completed and in-progress downloads.

fields.name: PUID
fields.label: PUID
fields.help: User ID used by the container for file permissions.

fields.name: PGID
fields.label: PGID
fields.help: Group ID used by the container for file permissions.

fields.name: TZ
fields.label: Timezone
fields.help:
Timezone used by Transmission logs and scheduled tasks.
Example: Asia/Dubai.

fields.name: RESTART_POLICY
fields.label: Restart Policy
fields.help: Controls whether the container restarts automatically.

fields.name: TRANSMISSION_NETWORK_MODE
fields.label: Network
fields.help: Choose Create New Bridge for the default Compose network, Host Mode for host networking, or an existing named Docker network.

fields.name: TRANSMISSION_IMAGE
fields.label: Image
fields.help:
Docker image used for Transmission.
Change this only if you want a different tag or image source.

fields.name: TRANSMISSION_CONTAINER_NAME
fields.label: Container Name
fields.help: EasyDocker sets the container name from the project name.

fields.name: TRANSMISSION_WEB_INTERNAL_PORT
fields.label: Internal Web UI Port
fields.help: Recipe-managed Transmission web UI internal port.

fields.name: TRANSMISSION_PEER_INTERNAL_PORT
fields.label: Internal Peer Port
fields.help: Recipe-managed Transmission torrent peer internal port.

ui.overview: Transmission is a lightweight torrent client with a built-in web interface.
what_happens: A Transmission container will be created
Your config and downloads folders will be mounted into the container
The web UI and peer ports will be published on the host
You can keep the default bridge network or attach Transmission to an existing network
ui.data_location: Relative paths are stored inside this app's project folder under the mounted EasyDocker base config path.
